amendment.description: To make appropriations for transparency and accountability.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5808 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 157.

action.text: Amendment SA 5808 proposed by Senator Padilla to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5808 proposed by Senator Padilla to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment not agreed to: Amendment SA 5808 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 157.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Amendment SA 5808 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 157.
